question.label: Reorg shift
question.name: You said 'the shift since the reorg' — what feels most different now?
question.description: Drills into the specific change she just named so the manager understands what shifted.

answer: I have been quieter in leadership meetings because I am still figuring out where my voice has most leverage.

assessment.note: She is pulling back in leadership meetings while uncertain where her voice has leverage — strong engagement drop, with an off-signature clarity issue also visible.

new_queue.label: Voice leverage
new_queue.name: Where does your voice feel least useful right now?

new_queue.label: Where things stand
new_queue.name: Before we get into specifics, what feels most worth talking through today?

new_queue.label: What shifted underneath
new_queue.name: What do you think has shifted underneath that?

new_queue.label: Priority tradeoff
new_queue.name: What are you saying yes to and no to right now?

new_queue.label: Support gap
new_queue.name: What support would actually take friction out of the next two weeks?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.
I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.
I have been quieter in leadership meetings because I am still figuring out where my voice has most leverage.
